changes.before: roads that already carried half the basin's harvest.
changes.after: roads already thick with half the basin's harvest traffic.

changes.before: the road had finally shown her enough.
changes.after: she had finally seen enough on the road.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → F1; A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → F3
changes.before: The headache had started within a mile of the waystation: ... The roads drew tighter with every mile
changes.after: The headache had started within a mile of the waystation, ... The roads converged with every mile

changes.before: That is not luck. Someone spent years on it.
changes.after: Someone spent years on it.

changes.before: Jaina could hear the rest of her meaning clearly enough: princes buried in visible war did not turn for threats they could not yet strike.
changes.after: Jaina could hear the rest of her meaning clearly enough. Princes buried in visible war did not turn for threats they could not yet strike.

changes.before: By late morning the feeder road had bent north enough to show the Strahnbrad approaches: churned mud...
changes.after: By late morning the feeder road had bent north enough to show the Strahnbrad approaches—churned mud...

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → F4; A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → F4
changes.before: The sight hit in two directions at once: familiar, and not hers. ... rooms where certainty walked in before he did.
changes.after: The sight hit in two directions at once, familiar and not hers. ... rooms where people yielded before he entered.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → F5; A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → F2
changes.before: The camp had gone up fast and meant to stay. ... This was not a camp waiting for trouble. It was already in it.
changes.after: The camp had gone up fast, built for a stay. ... The fighting had already reached it.

changes.before: He had also always filled a room in the same particular way: certainty first, charm second...
changes.after: He had also always filled a room in the same particular way, certainty first, charm second...

changes.before: That made the next part worse.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → F3; A → recurring-prose-tics.md → F6; B → narrator-seep-guide.md → F1
changes.before: There it was. Not contempt. Not blindness. Not the past walking in to do its old work. Worse: a refusal built on reasons solid enough to stand up under inspection.
changes.after: It was a refusal built on reasons solid enough to stand up under inspection.

changes.feedbackRef: A → recurring-prose-tics.md → F7; B → narrator-seep-guide.md → F2
changes.before: Around her the camp kept moving: crates, hammer blows, a pair of clerks arguing over a wagon count. Ordinary work, thick as mud.
changes.after: Around her the camp kept moving with crates, hammer blows, and a pair of clerks arguing over a wagon count.

changes.before: That landed because it was true.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F3; B → gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F4
changes.before: Sylvanas glanced at her. ... Jaina let out a breath through her nose.
changes.after: "Did you." ... Jaina rubbed her thumb along the rein leather.

changes.before: Not sentiment—never that, not now—but speed.
changes.after: She had wanted speed.

changes.before: That, at least, felt clean.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: The road improved with the traffic: broader, harder packed, ruts set deep by loaded wagons.
changes.after: The road improved with the traffic, broader and harder packed, with ruts set deep by loaded wagons.

changes.feedbackRef: B → phantom-concreteness-guide.md → F1; B → phantom-concreteness-guide.md → F2
changes.before: "Two points start a line." / "They also start mistakes."
changes.after: "Two men on two roads using the same farewell was enough to mark it." / "Or it was two grain men talking like grain men."

changes.before: The thing went into the file with the old seller and stayed there.
changes.after: She set it beside the old seller in her mind and left it there.

changes.before: She tightened her wards again, shaved the pain down by half, and noticed at the same time what the horses had been noticing for the last hour.
changes.after: She tightened her wards again, shaved the pain down by half, and found the horses with heads higher and ears working.

changes.before: Not panic. Obedience under protest.
changes.after: Obedience under protest.

changes.before: Andorhal stood across the winter fields, not ruined, not smoking, not dead. Walls. Rooflines...
changes.after: Andorhal stood across the winter fields alive with walls, rooflines, four granary towers, bakehouse smoke, wagons at the gate, and the distant hush of work.

changes.before: Just the basin doing what it had always done with grain.
changes.after: Just the basin's ordinary grain traffic under winter light.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → F7; A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → F8
changes.before: Not as a single sharp wound in the wards. Broader than that. ... and here was not a ruin or a battlefield but a functioning node...
changes.after: It pressed across the wards in a broad sheet. ... and here was a functioning node in plain sight.

changes.before: That was the proof Arthas had refused and the road had been carrying toward her all day.
changes.after: That was the proof Arthas had refused. The evidence she'd gathered all day had led here.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → F9; B → narrator-seep-guide.md → F3; A → recurring-prose-tics.md → F9
changes.before: The sight corrected the last argument she had been having with herself. Being right did nothing by itself. Not with princes. Not with camps. ...
changes.after: Seeing it corrected the last argument she'd been having with herself. A prince would ask for records. A camp would wait for orders. ...
